name: Brand Concept Utility Object Editorial
description: Magazine-style studio concept shot where AI invents a functional non-fashion object through a brand's material language

concept.object_rule: Invent one unexpected functional object (not clothing, shoes, or bags)
concept.design_brief: Object must feel sculptural yet functional, with clear usability cues and premium construction

subject.description: single hero object conceptualized as a REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME design study, photographed as high-end glossy concept art editorial

physical_details.finish: hyper-realistic tactile surfaces, no plastic look

environment.atmosphere: luxury concept editorial, polished but minimal

lighting.direction: large soft key with subtle enveloping fill and precision rim lights
effects: hero detail highlights on edges and engravings
creamy background bokeh with high material separation

realism_anchors: functional object geometry with plausible ergonomics
ceramic roughness and edge wear variation

flattened_prompt: high-end glossy concept editorial photo for REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME, invent one unexpected functional utility object (not clothing/shoes/bags), sculptural yet functional form language, ultra-premium tactile materials: patinated leather, brushed titanium, matte ceramic, carbon fiber, visible stitching, micro-grain, precision engravings, shot on Phase One medium format with 100mm macro, f/2.8, extremely shallow depth of field, cinematic softbox + fill + rim lighting, seamless REPLACE_ME_PASTEL_BACKGROUND cyclorama, clean and shadow-free background, bottom-right small monochrome REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME logo, bottom-left Manrope-like gray caption: CONCEPT STUDY with object name and materials, REPLACE_ME_EDITORIAL_SEASON
negative_prompt_flat: clothing, shoes, bag, human model, clutter, flat lighting, misplaced logo, watermark, cartoon, blurry

color_palette.secondary: graphite, titanium silver, matte ceramic neutrals
color_palette.contrast: high local contrast on object details with soft global background

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: Create a high-end glossy concept art magazine editorial photograph for REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME. Invent one novel functional utility object (not clothing, shoes, or bags) that reflects the brand's heritage and material vocabulary. The object should feel sculptural yet genuinely usable. Use hyper-premium tactile materials such as patinated leather, brushed aerospace titanium, matte ceramic, and carbon fiber, with visible stitching, microscopic grain, precision engravings, and contrast-rich surface behavior. Shoot as if on Phase One medium format with a 100mm macro lens, extremely shallow depth of field, and creamy bokeh. Use sophisticated studio softbox lighting with gentle fill and precise rim lighting to reveal contours and textures. Place the object in a seamless ultra-light pastel cyclorama, perfectly clean and shadow-free. Add strict UI placement: bottom-right small monochrome gray REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME logo; bottom-left small monochrome gray caption in Manrope-Regular-like style with tight tracking: CONCEPT STUDY: [invented object name]. MATERIAL: [main materials]. REPLACE_ME_EDITORIAL_SEASON.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Best for text placement, structured editorial layout, and complex material reasoning

flux.prompt: glossy concept magazine editorial for REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME, invented functional utility object not fashion accessory, sculptural usable form, premium materials leather titanium ceramic carbon fiber with stitching and engravings, Phase One 100mm macro look, ultra shallow depth, softbox fill plus rim light, seamless light pastel cyclorama, bottom-right monochrome logo, bottom-left concept study caption, ultra-detailed
flux.negative_prompt: human model, clothing, bag, shoes, clutter, cartoon, blurry, watermark

ideogram.prompt: Luxury concept editorial product photo for REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME featuring one invented functional object in premium mixed materials. Clean pastel cyclorama studio. Include small monochrome logo bottom-right and minimalist caption bottom-left with concept study text.

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: strict separation of concept, materials, camera, lighting, and overlay layout
2_realism_anchors: micro-texture, engravings, anisotropic highlights, and tactile material fidelity
3_technical_camera: explicit medium-format + macro spec for premium editorial look
4_negative_hygiene: excludes fashion items and clutter to preserve functional-object scope
5_spatial_consistency: strict bottom-left and bottom-right overlay placement constraints
6_brand_intelligence: autonomous object invention guided by brand heritage and material language
7_small_model_readability: REPLACE_ME tokens and fail-fast substitution rules
